name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_PATHWAY_FAMILY_COUNT
description: Top assignees by pathway family count. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (pw:Pathway {name: $pathway})<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)<-[:HAS_PATENT]-(fam:Family)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT fam) AS family_count
ORDER BY family_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Within target-pair combinations related to the TCF dependent signaling in response to WNT pathway, which companies filed the most patent families? Please provide the top 10.
Within target-pair combinations related to the Signaling by ERBB2 KD Mutants pathway, which companies filed the most patent families? Please provide the top 10.
Within target-pair combinations related to the SARS-CoV-1-host interactions pathway, which companies filed the most patent families? Please provide the top 10.
